marketNote: Water is a municipal monopoly tied to your address. Household water/sewage is an obligatory local public service (obvezna obcinska gospodarska javna sluzba); each municipality assigns one public utility and the consumer cannot switch provider. Tariffs are cost-based and approved by the municipal council under a state methodology (Uredba / ZOPVOOV), so there is no shopping-around or price competition. Advisor treats water as info-only: explain the bill line items (vodarina, omreznina, odvajanje/kanalscina, ciscenje, okoljska dajatev), not as a switch opportunity.

volumetricPerM3: okoljska dajatev (state environmental levy on wastewater, ~0.0528 EUR/m3)
fixedMonthly: omreznina (network/infrastructure fee, EUR/month, scaled by water-meter diameter DN; household DN<=20 = factor 1)
vzdrzevalnina vodomera (meter maintenance, in some utilities e.g. Maribor)
billStructure.notes: Volumetric charges are all billed per m3 of metered drinking water consumed (wastewater volume is assumed equal to water drawn). Fixed omreznina does not depend on usage, only on connection/meter size. Prices shown include 9.5% VAT unless noted.

providers.provider: JP VOKA Snaga (Javno podjetje Vodovod Kanalizacija Snaga)

otherFees: okoljska dajatev za odpadno vodo (~0.0528 EUR/m3, state levy)
prekomerna poraba surcharge: +50% on vodarina above normed use (1.0886 EUR/m3)

providers.notes: Rates with 9.5% VAT, valid from 1.2.2026, per official VOKA Snaga price list EAD-300819. Fixed monthly figures are for a household water meter DN<=20 (omreznina factor 1). A single-family home on public sewer pays roughly 20-24 EUR/month for water+sewage before waste collection; VOKA's own worked example for a single-family house connected to sewer was 35.94 EUR/month total (2025, incl. waste). Same utility also serves Brezovica, Dobrova-Polhov Gradec, Dol pri Ljubljani, Medvode, Skofljica, Ig, Horjul.

providers.provider: Mariborski vodovod d.o.o. (water supply) + Nigrad d.o.o. (sewage/treatment)

otherFees: subsidized vodarina 0.9500 EUR/m3 for non-commercial users
sewage/treatment (kanalscina) billed separately by Nigrad; Nigrad wastewater-treatment component e.g. 0.52825 EUR/m3 for septic-to-sewer cases

providers.notes: Water-supply (vodarina + omreznina + meter maintenance) rates with 9.5% VAT from Mariborski vodovod price list, DN<=20 household meter. In Maribor the water utility (Mariborski vodovod) and the sewerage/treatment utility (Nigrad) are separate companies but each is still the sole assigned provider for its service - no consumer choice. Water-supply figures dated 2022 (latest published on their cenik page); wastewater rates set by municipal ordinance via Nigrad.

regulator: Municipal council (obcinski svet) approves tariffs; methodology set by national Uredba o metodologiji za oblikovanje cen storitev obveznih obcinskih GJS varstva okolja and ZOPVOOV (Zakon o oskrbi s pitno vodo ter odvajanju in ciscenju komunalne odpadne vode).
